text: An armed man has taken a hostage in a kosher store in Paris (Porte de Vincennes)
The two Charlie Hebdo suspects have been killed in a police assault in Dammartin
Four cartoonists were killed in the Charlie Hebdo attack
The Charlie Hebdo suspects are holed up inside printing business in Dammartin
The gunmen confronted/had a shoot-out with police outside Charlie Hebdo
(At least) 10 people are dead at Charlie Hebdo offices
" Multiple"  gunmen were involved in the Charlie Hebdo attack
The gunmen at Charlie Hebdo yelled, "The Prophet is avenged"
Banksy drew a tribute to Charlie Hebdo featuring 3 red pencils
Police officer shot at Montrouge has died of her injuries
Several hostages have been freed in Porte de Vincennes
The gunmen were asking for the journalists by name
Three gunmen are on the run after the Charlie Hebdo attack
Hostages have been taken (at a business) in Dammartin-en-Goele
5 people have been injured in the Charlie Hebdo attack
Two (masked) gunmen were involved in the Charlie Hebdo attack
Nine journalists died in the Charlie Hebdo attack
Attackers yelled out "Allahu Akbar" on their way out
The gunmen said, "You tell the media it was al-Qaeda in Yemen"
Kosher supermarket gunman is asking for release of Charlie Hebdo suspects
There are at least five hostages in Porte de Vincennes kosher store
Stephane Charbonnier was critically injured in the Charlie Hebdo attack
Shots have been fired (and a car chase taken place) in Dammartin-en-Goele
There was gunfire at the Porte de Vincennes
12 people died in connection with the Charlie Hebdo attack
Ahmed Merabet was the first victim of the Charlie Hebdo attack
At least two dead in hostage-taking in Porte de Vincennes
The gunman at the kosher store is linked to the killing of the police officer in Montrouge
One person was injured in shootout in kosher store
Two Charlie Hebdo suspects have been spotted (in a town/gas station in Northern France)
ID card of one of the Charlie Hebdo suspects found in car abandoned by gunmen
At least one person has been killed (and several injured) in shootout with Charlie Hebdo suspects northeast of Paris
There is a gunman/has been a shooting incident in Trocadero (police clearing the area)
The hostage in Dammartin has been freed following police assault
11 people died during the Charlie Hebdo attack
Kosher restaurants /Jewish shops (and schools, synagogues, etc.) are closing in Paris in wake of Porte de Vincennes hostage-taking
Killing of Montrouge police officer is linked to Charlie Hebdo attack (or killer is linked to CH suspects)
A police operation (convoy, helicopters) is underway to catch the Charlie Hebdo suspects northeast of Paris
The attack took place during the (weekly) editorial meeting
The Kosher market suspect has links to the Charlie Hebdo suspects
Suspect Hamyd Mourad was in class at the time of the Charlie Hebdo shooting
2 police officers died during the Charlie Hebdo attack
The gunmen were armed with Kalashnikovs and rocket launchers
The Charlie Hebdo suspects say they want/are ready to die as martyrs
The Charlie Hebdo suspects came out firing from the Dammartin building
The suspect in the hostage-taking at the Kosher market is dead
At least two reportedly injured in Porte de Vincennes hostage situation
A police officer has been shot/wounded in Montrouge
The hostage being held by the Charlie Hebdo suspects is a 26-year-old male
The shooting of two policemen in Montrouge is not connected to the Charlie Hebdo attack
One Charlie Hebdo suspect (H. Mourad) has handed himself in to police
A baby is among the hostages in the Kosher market
The Charlie Hebdo gunmen spoke French
Two people (seriously) wounded in shootout in hunt for Charlie Hebdo suspects northeast of Paris
Shots were fired at Montrouge in Paris
The Charlie Hebdo gunmen had military training
The Charlie Hebdo gunmen fled in a stolen car
ISIS has claimed responsibility for Charlie Hebdo attack and announced more attacks to come in the West
Three suspects (inc. two brothers) have been identified in the Charlie Hebdo attacks
French media outlets to be placed under police protection
